Cause: Jam sensor active for > jam timer preset while motor running
Operator Action: 1. Press STOP. 2. Clear jam from conveyor. 3. Verify jam sensor clears. 4. Press FAULT RESET. 5. Resume AUTO.

Cause: Motor run command ON but auxiliary contact feedback OFF for > 2 seconds
Operator Action: 1. Press STOP. 2. Check motor starter/contactor. 3. Check motor overload relay. 4. Reset overload if tripped. 5. Check 480VAC power. 6. Press FAULT RESET.

Cause: PLC heartbeat bit stopped toggling (HMI has not seen change in > 2 seconds)
Operator Action: 1. Check PLC scan indicator. 2. Check Ethernet connection between HMI and PLC. 3. Verify PLC is not in STOP/FAULT mode. 4. Cycle PLC power if unresponsive.

Cause: Both IN_SIZE_SMALL and IN_SIZE_LARGE active simultaneously — indicates sensor failure or damaged box
Operator Action: 1. Press STOP. 2. Inspect size sensors for alignment or damage. 3. Verify sensor mounting. 4. Test each sensor individually. 5. Press FAULT RESET.

Cause: E-stop button pressed or safety circuit opened
Operator Action: 1. Investigate cause of E-stop. 2. Ensure area is safe. 3. Twist/pull to release E-stop button. 4. Press FAULT RESET. 5. Resume normal operation.

Cause: Total box count has reached the configured production target (200 boxes)
Operator Action: 1. Acknowledge. 2. Perform shift changeover. 3. Press Shift Reset to clear counters for next shift.
